case_title: EKATERINA VASSILIEVA VS. SONYA SOPHIA STEVENS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100007078)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-02-2015 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF EKATERINA VASSILIEVA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

FRAUD, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASSILIEVA, EKATERINA AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS, SONYA SOPHIA STEVENS, PAUL DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-10-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-10-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-19-2016
FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT OF EKATERINA VASSILIEVA FILED ON 9/11/15 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF VASSILIEVA, EKATERINA

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASSILIEVA, EKATERINA HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-10-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
